title: Reusable Double Exposure Persona With Double Exposure Persona
sourceTitle: The Shape Of A Creative Life Double Exposure Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable double exposure persona with double-exposure persona composition that blends portrait silhouette, symbolic scene, and layered mood. Act as a Senior Art Director. PHASE 1: PHOTOGRAPHIC COMPOSITION. - Layered Effect: Double exposure photo collage. Persona: senior art director with calm profile silhouette. Inner World: miniature scenes of early sketching, client pitch room, night studio, and final exhibition wall. Career Phases: student phase, agency grind, creative leadership, reflective mentor stage. Exposure Shape: large side-profile portrait filled with layered cinematic memories. Poster. Palette: warm black, copper, paper white, and smoky amber. Caption Text: THE SHAPE OF A CREATIVE LIFE. Subject: Make senior art director with calm profile silhouette the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: Act as a Senior Art Director. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use large side-profile portrait filled with layered cinematic memories. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in persona double-exposure poster visual finish preserving these source cues: double-exposure silhouette mechanism, life/career phase layering, editorial poster mood. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use warm black, copper, paper white, and smoky amber. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
